records.question: Which employee has the first name Ralph, last name Matler, initial F, was born on 1973-12-2, hired on 1995-8-1, and whose job code is PROF?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1973-12-2' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Ralph' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1995-8-1' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Matler' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' AND employee.emp_initial = 'F'
records.pred_sql: select emp_num from employee where lower(emp_fname) like '%ralph%' and lower(emp_lname) like '%matler%' and lower(emp_initial) like '%f%' and emp_dob = '1973-12-2' and emp_hiredate = '1995-8-1' and emp_jobcode = 'PROF' limit 5
records.thought: Filter the employee table by matching all given personal details and job code PROF to find the specific employee.

records.question: Which professor named Robert Smith born on 1937-12-30 teaches the class in room BUS252 during section 3 at TTh 2:30-3:45 p.m?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE class.class_time = 'TTh 2:30-3:45 p.m.' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Robert' AND employee.emp_dob = '1937-12-30' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Smith' AND class.class_section = '3' AND class.class_room = 'BUS252'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join class on employee.emp_num = class.prof_num where lower(employee.emp_fname) like '%robert%' and lower(employee.emp_lname) like '%smith%' and employee.emp_dob = '1937-12-30' and class.class_room like '%bus252%' and class.class_section = '3' and lower(class.class_time) like '%tth 2:30-3:45 p.m%' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter the employee table for the professor named Robert Smith born on 1937-12-30, join with class to find the class taught in room BUS252 during section 3 at TTh 2:30-3:45 p.m., then select the employee number.

records.question: Which employees with the initial B, hired on 1978-8-1, have the job code PROF and work in the Accounting department within the BUS school?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B' AND department.dept_name = 'Accounting' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join professor on employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num join department on professor.dept_code = department.dept_code where lower(employee.emp_initial) like '%b%' and employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1' and employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' and lower(department.dept_name) like '%accounting%' and department.school_code = 'BUS' limit 5
records.thought: Filter employees by initial 'B', hire date '1978-8-1', job code 'PROF', and join with department to ensure they work in the Accounting department within the BUS school.

records.question: Who is Todd H Wilson born on 1966-10-19 and hired exactly on 1990-11-6?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1966-10-19' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1990-11-6' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Wilson' AND employee.emp_initial = 'H' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Todd'

records.question: Which employees named Gerald are teaching any classes?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
WHERE employee.emp_fname = 'Gerald'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join class on employee.emp_num = class.prof_num where lower(employee.emp_fname) like '%gerald%' limit 5;
records.thought: To find employees named Gerald who are teaching classes, join EMPLOYEE and CLASS on EMP_NUM and filter EMP_FNAME for 'gerald'.

records.question: Which employees are named George and have a date of birth exactly on 1962-10-2?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
WHERE employee.emp_fname = 'George' AND employee.emp_dob = '1962-10-2'
records.pred_sql: select emp_num from employee where lower(emp_fname) like '%george%' and emp_dob = '1962-10-2' limit 5;
records.thought: Filter employees whose first name contains 'george' (case insensitive) and whose date of birth is exactly '1962-10-2'.

records.question: Which employees named Ralph F Matler, born on 1973-12-2 with job code PROF, have a professor record where the highest degree is MBA and the extension is 2851?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN professor ON employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num
WHERE professor.prof_high_degree = 'MBA' AND employee.emp_dob = '1973-12-2' AND employee.emp_fname = 'Ralph' AND employee.emp_initial = 'F' AND professor.prof_extension = '2851' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Matler' AND employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join professor on employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num where lower(employee.emp_fname) like '%ralph%' and lower(employee.emp_lname) like '%matler%' and employee.emp_initial = 'F' and employee.emp_dob = '1973-12-2' and employee.emp_jobcode = 'PROF' and lower(professor.prof_high_degree) like '%mba%' and professor.prof_extension = '2851' limit 5
records.thought: Filter employees by name, birthdate, and job code, then join with professor to check highest degree and extension.

records.question: Which employees born exactly on 1949-5-16 work in departments where the dept_extension is 3245?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN professor ON employee.emp_num = professor.emp_num
JOIN department ON professor.dept_code = department.dept_code
WHERE employee.emp_dob = '1949-5-16' AND department.dept_extension = '3245'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join department on employee.emp_num = department.emp_num where employee.emp_dob = '1949-5-16' and department.dept_extension = '3245' limit 5
records.thought: Filter employees by birthdate and join with department to check for the specified dept_extension.

records.question: Which employees whose initial is B are involved in both classes and departments?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_initial = 'B'
records.pred_sql: select distinct e.emp_num from employee e join class c on e.emp_num = c.prof_num join department d on e.emp_num = d.emp_num where lower(e.emp_initial) like '%b%' limit 5
records.thought: Find employees with initial 'B' who appear as professors in classes and also are linked to departments, ensuring they are involved in both classes and departments.

records.question: Which employees with the first name Gerald, last name Graztevski, and hire date 1978-8-1 have related class records taught by them and have department records in the Accounting department of the BUS school code?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT employee.emp_num FROM employee
JOIN class ON employee.emp_num = class.prof_num
JOIN department ON employee.emp_num = department.emp_num
WHERE employee.emp_fname = 'Gerald' AND department.dept_name = 'Accounting' AND employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1' AND department.school_code = 'BUS' AND employee.emp_lname = 'Graztevski'
records.pred_sql: select employee.emp_num from employee join class on employee.emp_num = class.prof_num join department on employee.emp_num = department.emp_num where lower(employee.emp_fname) like '%gerald%' and lower(employee.emp_lname) like '%graztevski%' and employee.emp_hiredate = '1978-8-1' and lower(department.dept_name) like '%accounting%' and department.school_code = 'BUS' limit 5
records.thought: Filter employees by first name, last name, and hire date, join with class to ensure they teach classes, and join with department to check they belong to the Accounting department in the BUS school code.
